arts.ttl: O’Gorman on the podium in JuniorGP action in Spain
arts.sum: With only three laps remaining, Quiles made his move into second place with and tried to make a break from O’Gorman and Pini but the Italian Pini was back in front by the end of the long back straight. Final lap and barring a mistake, Carpe had the win in the bag but the drama was unfolding behind him as O’Gorman decided to make his move and tried to dive up the inside of Qulies and Pini into the first turn.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal equalled a surprise international record in Spain’s win over Denmark
arts.sum: Barcelona starlet Lamine Yamal secured for himself a head-turning piece of personal history, in his latest outing on the international stage. Wide-man Lamine was for his part back in action…

arts.ttl: Rodri overlooked by Man City teammate when naming Ballon d'Or winner
arts.sum: If Vinicius Junior, for whom Real Madrid paid big money when he was just 16, is successful, he would become the first player born in the 21st century to win the Ballon d'Or. Manchester City goalkeeper Ederson has backed someone other than teammate Rodri to win the 2024 edition of the Ballon d'Or, favouring country over club in the debate.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams opens up on Barcelona fans booing and failed Arsenal & Chelsea transfers
arts.sum: Athletic Club winger Nico Williams has confessed there were plenty of "difficult" moments this summer as he was courted by Arsenal, Chelsea and Barcelona. "On a personal level, there have also been tough times in which you stop to think about many scenarios and it is difficult, but I have an incredible family and friends who support me.

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella hits out at 'biased referees' ahead of Liverpool suspension
arts.sum: The left-back argued to COPE that Premier League referees are looking for revenge this season, having already shown him the five yellow cards needed to earn a one-game suspension, which he will serve against Liverpool at the weekend. "It's normal, we won, I was involved in the goal, I'm playing at their home...

arts.ttl: Barcelona learn extent of Lamine Yamal injury
arts.sum: Barcelona's Lamine Yamal has avoided any serious damage after limping off during Spain's 1-0 victory over Denmark on Saturday evening. "Tests carried out this morning on Lamine Yamal have confirmed that he has an overload in the hamstring of his left thigh," Barcelona added.

arts.ttl: ‘I can’t lie…’ – Nico Williams on Barcelona fans whistling & booing him
arts.sum: Athletic Club star Nico Williams has on Monday provided his take on the frosty reception afforded to him on the part of Barcelona’s supporters earlier this season. Nico, for his…

arts.ttl: Nico Williams reveals 'only thing that matters' after Barcelona snub
arts.sum: Nico Williams insists that he is not thinking about his future after turning down a move to Barcelona in the summer. Nico Williams reveals 'only thing that matters' after Barcelona snub

arts.ttl: Barcelona, Man United receive transfer boost as Nico Williams addresses his future at Athletic Bilbao
arts.sum: Athletic Bilbao forward Nico Williams addresses his future amid suggestions that Barcelona, Manchester United, Arsenal and Liverpool all want to sign him.

arts.ttl: Barça's Yamal set to be fit for Clásico, Bayern
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal is a doubt for Barcelona's LaLiga match against Sevilla on Sunday after the club confirmed he picked up a hamstring strain.
